Giovanni Francesco Grimaldi

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
River Landscape with View of St. Peter's Basilica
by Giovanni Francesco Grimaldi
Italy, 17th century · after 1660 · pen and brown ink over traces of black chalk; framing lines in graphite
←John Griffiths Attributed to a Member of the Earlier Mannerist Group→
